title: ClimbFence
description: A simple Server-Plugin that let's you climb over a Fence :)
body: This plugin is a small quality of life feature that lets you climb over fences. You dont need any commands, just head up to a fence, press the space bar and climb over it. No more animals that can escape because you accidentally destroyed the fence! No more blocks to place because you are lazy to get through the fence gate. So...just climb over it ;)
